authority.validity: Forcing and derivation are admitted by the engine's trace, closure and halt standards; this registry cannot declare them valid by prose.
authority.publication: Maria Smith alone declares publishable conclusions, benchmark findings, victories, losses and real-run status.
authority.agent_evidence: Agent-created probes and development executions remain auxiliary evidence unless Maria adopts a conclusion from them.

route_status_interpretation: Every blind_selector_v4 through blind_selector_v33 route-status entry describes archived non-admitted agent development implementation and applied evidence only. V34 through V45 are separately admitted named forward-forcing compositions whose complete generated spaces, uniqueness and halt guards are registered individually. Protein material architecture V1 is separately admitted as an explicitly target-assisted forward-forcing constitution: its relation derives before runtime from the protected witness, while its sealed runtime is target-inaccessible. Terms inside immutable historical manifests or source-bound descriptions do not promote an assembled form to forced or derived status. The separate derivation-admission gate is authoritative.

visible_history.finding: The first visible commit already contains the theorem copy, all-purpose predictor, target-guided optimisers, legacy outputs and agent-authored workspace guidance. Git history therefore cannot prove their pre-project origin or forcing provenance.
visible_history.rule: No source is admitted from commit authorship alone; it must be classified and executable routes must be bound independently.

route_status.theorem_foundation: engine-closed One/fold, exact-arithmetic, structural-count, target-boundary, assembly-enumeration and form-enforcement foundation
route_status.protein_engine_closed_relations: engine-closed fold fixed-point, declared descent-query, colour-window overlap, inter-window quartet and canonical alpha/beta angle forms with complete applicable candidate enumeration and executable halt guards
route_status.protein_historical_engine_checks: immutable source-bound predecessors retained for sealed-selector provenance; the V2 successors are the current admission authority
route_status.blind_selector_v2: preserved development evidence with mixed legacy dependencies; not the clean continuation route
route_status.blind_selector_v3: named provenance-isolated forward-forcing development constitution; target-isolated and source-bound, but not relabelled as an engine-derived theorem

route_status.legacy_engines: retained history only; excluded from promoted and active continuation routes

inherited_toolchain_boundary.role: bundled ErnosPlain compiler shared with the main SFT corpus; infrastructure for compiling the .ep law, not a Protein-specific forcing mechanism
inherited_toolchain_boundary.canonical_comparison: byte-identical tracked file set to /Users/mettamazza/Desktop/Smithian Fold Theory/compiler at audit time
inherited_toolchain_boundary.rule: the boundary is hash-checked as inherited infrastructure and cannot enter selector-v3 runtime

inherited_foundation_boundary.role: byte-identical copy of the nine-file exact One/fold, structural-count, enforcement, measured-value, assembly-enumeration and form-enforcement foundation from the main SFT corpus
inherited_foundation_boundary.canonical_comparison: byte-identical file-by-file to /Users/mettamazza/Desktop/Smithian Fold Theory/foundation at audit time
inherited_foundation_boundary.rule: this closes the copied foundation provenance only; it does not promote Protein-specific assembled forms

generated_evidence.pdb_files: Targets, constructions and development outputs are data, not forcing source; protected or sealed routes bind them by SHA-256.
